# Tharun K M

> Tharun K M is a researcher and data-driven policy enthusiast based in India. His work focuses on business analytics, sustainability, and applied data science. This is his personal website.

Analytically grounded researcher with training in economics, data science, and public policy. Experienced in statistical modeling, machine learning, and working with large-scale administrative and survey datasets. Interested in bridging rigorous analysis with real-world policy and infrastructure challenges.

## About

Tharun has an interdisciplinary background spanning economics, data science, and sustainability. His work focuses on understanding complex systems—ranging from transport networks to financial inclusion—using empirical methods and computational tools.

He has worked with datasets such as PLFS, gridded climate data, and administrative transport records, applying techniques like regression analysis, index construction, and simulation modeling.

His research interests include tech policy, urban systems, environmental economics, and development policy. He is particularly interested in how data systems shape governance capacity and citizen outcomes.

## Work & Research Experience

- **Digital Public Infrastructure Research** – Focus on governance, inclusion, and scalability of DPI systems in India.
- **Urban Transport Sustainability Project** – Built a composite index for 11 Urban Local Bodies (2016–2024), covering environment, infrastructure, mobility, and safety.
- **Wage Determination Analysis (PLFS Data)** – Conducted regression analysis using Stata on demographic and structural determinants of wages.
- **Airport Runway Simulation** – Modeled runway congestion using M/M/C queueing frameworks and simulation in Python.

## Projects

- **Urban Transport Sustainability Index** – Multi-dimensional index combining transport, environmental, and infrastructure indicators.
- **Human Activity Recognition (HAR)** – Machine learning project involving classification and feature engineering. And many more ML Projects.
- **Rainfall Data Visualization** – Processed NetCDF climate data and created temporal visualizations (GIFs) for India.
- **Mobility & Socioeconomic Data Analysis** – Integrated district-level datasets to study transport access and development outcomes.

## Writing & Interests

Tharun explores ideas at the intersection of economics, technology, and society. His interests include:

- Development economics and inequality  
- Geopolitics and the macroeconomy
- Sustainability and climate data  
- Networks, systems thinking, and complexity  
- Decision-making, cognition, and learning  

## Skills

- **Programming:** Python, R, SQL, Stata, Vibe-coding
- **Methods:** Econometrics, Machine Learning, Financial Modeling, Literature Review  
- **Data:** National-level Survey data, global development data, geospatial data, climate data (IPCC)
- **Tools:** MS Word, LaTeX, Canva, MS PowerPoint, Google Docs  
- **Languages:** Kannada (Native), English (Full Professional), Hindi (Full Working)
